Student.title: Student
Student.description: A student profile participating in the MashMatch competitive matching.

género.description: Gender category of the student (hombres or mujeres).

coronas.description: Total number of times this student held/reached the #1 spot.

crushes.description: Total number of times this student was marked as a crush.

perfilPhotoUrl.description: Dicebear or other custom avatar path.

Config.title: System Config
Config.description: General system configuration including administrative countdown timers.

targetDate.description: ISO format date-time string when voting ends.

isActive.description: Whether the countdown timer is active or suspended.

AdminUser.title: Admin Registered User
AdminUser.description: Information of users registering via Google Sign-In in the admin console.

VotesCounter.title: Votes Counter Resumen
VotesCounter.description: Aggregated statistics representing general, male, and female voting tallies.

voto_general.description: Grand total of all cast votes.

voto_hombres.description: Total votes cast on the male category candidate.

voto_mujeres.description: Total votes cast on the female category candidate.

VersusRecord.title: VersusRecord
VersusRecord.description: A record of match results against a specific opponent.

contador.description: Number of wins or losses against this opponent.

perfilPhotoUrl.description: Profile picture URL of the opponent.

StarsRating.title: StarsRating
StarsRating.description: Accumulated count for user experience ratings on a scale of 1-5.

UserComment.title: UserComment
UserComment.description: Optional comment submitted by a user along with their star rating.

stars.description: Number of stars given from 1 to 5.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when matching comment was created.

AnonymousUser.title: Anonymous User
AnonymousUser.description: Information of anonymous voters tracking their activity.

nombre.description: Name of the anonymous user (e.g., 'Usuario Anónimo').

ultimaEntrada.description: Timestamp of the user's last entry into the app.

INGLES1.Estudiantes/generos/{generoId}/{.description: Nested collection of participating students categories.
Subcollection under a student profile tracking other students won against.
Subcollection under a student profile tracking other students lost against.

INGLES1.Estudiantes/registro/admin/{user.description: Subcollection under INGLES1.Estudiantes documenting Google-authenticated users and administrators.

config/{configId}.description: General configuration parameters accessed by clients.

INGLES1.Estudiantes/configuracion/config.description: Nested configuration subcollection matching CTA7 layout.

INGLES1.Estudiantes/configuracion/votos/.description: Subcollection under configuracion documenting general and gender-specific vote statistics.

INGLES1.Estudiantes/configuracion/experi.description: Subcollection tracking accumulated star feedback counts (1 to 5 stars) from users.
Subcollection storing optional user comments alongside their rated stars.

INGLES1.Estudiantes/configuracion/users/.description: Subcollection under configuracion documenting anonymous users and their activity.
